metadata.releaseNotes:
We’re continuously working to make your Univest experience smoother, faster, and more intuitive.
What’s new:

A. Revamped Demat Experience
Cleaner design, easier navigation, better control of your investments.

B. Enhanced Filters
Find the right opportunities faster with smarter filtering.

Never miss an opportunity — discover advisory ideas directly while exploring markets.
A few performance improvements and stability updates across the app.
metadata.description:
Discover Univest: Your Ultimate Stock Market Advisory

Maximize your returns by exiting underperforming investments and investing with confidence through Univest.

Univest is an advanced investment platform designed to meet your specific needs. Benefit from options strategies, futures, and equity trade ideas from SEBI-registered Research Analysts, AI-driven 'Buy/Sell/Hold' recommendations, premium screeners, and access to top stock picks, including potential multibaggers. Elevate your investment journey with Univest, unlocking your portfolio's full potential.

Key Features:

- AI-Powered Recommendations: Get tailored 'Buy/Sell/Hold' trends aligned with your investment style.
- Expert Insights: Access personalized trade ideas from SEBI-registered Analysts for both futures and equities.
- Top Stock Picks: Invest in well-researched stocks, including those with multibagger potential.
- Advanced Screeners: Identify daily breakouts, oversold stocks, and 52-week highs with ease.
- Concise Mar
